title: ClientProtocol Provider
description: The 'protocol' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains the 'ClientProtocol.java' file, defining the communication protocol between JobClient and JobTracker. It includes methods for job submission, status retrieval, and resource management. The 'ClientProtocolProvider.java' file serves as an abstract factory for creating ClientProtocol instances, providing methods to create and close ClientProtocol using Configuration or InetSocketAddress and Configuration. The former defines the interaction logic, while the latter handles resource release. Both files utilize standard Java and Hadoop classes, with ClientProtocolProvider being abstract and intended for subclass implementation.
